title: The latest recommended Combine and CombineHarvester versions

posts.name: Aliya Nigamova
posts.cooked_html:
Dear all,

From now on the latest recommended versions of Combine and CombineHarvester will be announced in this forum.

Combine: v9.1.0, setup instructions.
CombineHarvester: v2.0.0, setup instructions.

Best,
Aliya

posts.name: Aliya Nigamova
posts.text:
Dear all,
The latest recommended tag for CombineHarvester was recently updated to v2.1.0.
CombineHarvester: v2.1.0, setup instructions .
Combine: v9.1.0 , setup instructions . (the same as before)
Best,
Aliya

posts.name: Aliya Nigamova
posts.text:
Dear All,
We have released a new Combine version -  v10.0.0, compatible with el9 architecture and ROOT = v6.30/07, for more details please follow the setup instructions.
Please note that this version also includes combineTool.py scripts, so you do not have install CombineHarvester package to use them. CombineHarvester release compatible with ROOT v6.30 will follow soon.
Best,
Aliya
posts.cooked_html:
Dear All,

We have released a new Combine version - v10.0.0, compatible with el9 architecture and ROOT = v6.30/07, for more details please follow the setup instructions.

Please note that this version also includes combineTool.py scripts, so you do not have install CombineHarvester package to use them. CombineHarvester release compatible with ROOT v6.30 will follow soon.

Best,
Aliya

posts.name: Aliya Nigamova
posts.text:
Dear all,
The update the Combine v10 release with a patch v10.0.1 which is fixing the issue reported by @trunting here , for more details please follow the setup instructions.
Best,
Aliya
posts.cooked_html:
Dear all,

Best,
Aliya

posts.name: Aliya Nigamova
posts.text:
Dear all,
New CombineHarvester release v3.0.0-pre1 compatible with CMSSW_14_1_X (ROOT v6.30) is now available, note that this is a pre-release, since there are known issues with parsing the datacards with RooDataHist objects.
The latest Combine and CombineHarvester versions are:
Combine: v10.0.1, setup instructions. (the same as before)
CombineHarvester: v3.0.0-pre1, setup instructions .
Best,
Aliya
posts.cooked_html:
Dear all,

New CombineHarvester release v3.0.0-pre1 compatible with CMSSW_14_1_X (ROOT v6.30) is now available, note that this is a pre-release, since there are known issues with parsing the datacards with RooDataHist objects.

The latest Combine and CombineHarvester versions are:

Combine: v10.0.1, setup instructions. (the same as before)
CombineHarvester: v3.0.0-pre1, setup instructions .

Best,
Aliya

posts.name: Aliya Nigamova
posts.text:
Dear all,
The latest recommended tag for Combine was recently updated.
It is strongly recommended to switch to v10.3.0, due to the recently discovered bug affecting statistical models with `shapeN` uncertainties (see the corresponding issue and PR fixing it), and reevaluate the analysis results if the shapeN are used with Combine releases v10.0.2-v10.2.1.
Combine: v10.3.0, setup instructions
CombineHarvester: v3.0.0 , setup instructions
Best,
Aliya
posts.cooked_html:
Dear all,

The latest recommended tag for Combine was recently updated.

It is strongly recommended to switch to v10.3.0, due to the recently discovered bug affecting statistical models with `shapeN` uncertainties (see the corresponding issue and PR fixing it), and reevaluate the analysis results if the shapeN are used with Combine releases v10.0.2-v10.2.1.

Combine: v10.3.0, setup instructions
CombineHarvester: v3.0.0 , setup instructions

Best,
Aliya

posts.name: Aliya Nigamova
posts.text:
Dear all,
The latest recommended tag for Combine was recently updated.
In the latest Combine version v10.3.0 you could have experienced issues with physics models, this issue is fixed in v10.3.1 with PR 1163, so please update the tag.
Combine: v10.3.1, setup instructions
CombineHarvester: v3.0.0 , setup instructions
Best,
Aliya

posts.text:
Dear all,
The latest recommended tag for Combine was recently updated to v10.3.3. This release addresses the bug in FastScan method, details are in the release notes. Please update your Combine setup.
Combine: v10.3.3, setup instructions
CombineHarvester: v3.0.0 , setup instructions (the same as before).
Best,
Aliya
